name: Startup Folder Paths
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Defines the file system path for the user's Startup folder. Can be redirected to an attacker-controlled directory.
forensic_value: Check Startup folder path resolves to expected %APPDATA%\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup. Redirected path defeats tools checking the default location.
